# BinaryBrains Family Salon

## Purpose
Build a production-ready, trust-first Family Salon platform with a premium customer experience and complete backend integration.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Express.js
- PostgreSQL
- Prisma ORM
- Tailwind CSS
- Radix UI
- JWT Authentication

## Core Principles
- Trust before transactions
- Real backend integration (no mock data)
- Clean, modern, family-friendly UI
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA)
- Secure, scalable architecture
- Reusable, maintainable code

## Rules
- Use backend APIs as the single source of truth.
- Do not use hardcoded or placeholder data.
- Preserve the existing light theme.
- Do not redesign the product identity.
- Keep components modular and reusable.
- Follow React, Next.js, and Express best practices.
- Prioritize UX, performance, and security.

## Done Criteria
Every feature must:
- Consume real APIs
- Handle loading, empty, error, and success states
- Respect authentication and RBAC
- Be responsive and accessible
- Be production-ready
